enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about a day spent with his mom visiting a thrift store (Goodwill or similar), where they scored furniture including a large rug, a one-person blue couch, and three chairs for around $25. He shares plans to organize and decorate his room and mentions wanting to set up a green screen for future videos.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: excited and enthusiastic about the deals he scored
amused by an out-of-state woman's reaction to the smell of weed
motivated to set it up to level up production quality

transcript.text: Hey, how's it going?
This video is living in Boulder V-Log for January 29th, 2017.
I didn't do one for yesterday because I just got too busy with my stuff.
I got up early. I was up until like 3 and then I got up at like 9.
Went over to my mom's house and we went over to the thrift shop to stand in line early
So we could get our goods.
And it's funny, while we're standing in line, the thrift shop is next to a dispensary
And there's this old lady from a different state where weed's not legal and she's like,
Oh look, dispensary. I feel so sorry for people who have businesses near to dispensary.
I was at the, even at the intersection down there, I could smell all of the weed.
I was like 400 meters away.
I couldn't even smell it where we were there.
It's crazy.
So anyway, we opened a car, they opened a thing and we got our stuff.
I got my rug. I'll do the video of it later.
I got a big old rug. It takes up most of my room. It's awesome.
The open area of my room, it takes up.
And I have a good open area of my room. It's awesome.
It's like as big as the open area here in my living room.
Yeah, so then she got me a couch too, a one-person couch. It's felt blue. I'll do a video of it later.
It's really comfortable and beautiful and the mouse fits right on top of it. It's awesome.
It's like a Starbucks couch.
And then she got me these three chairs, like this one that I'm sitting on now, a set, and three for like 25 bucks.
It was like everything for like 100 bucks. It was so cool.
Got this big-ass rug for like 60. It's awesome.
So I got motivated to organize my room, so just more stuff with my room.
So I decided to go ahead and post photos of like muscle chick legs up on my ceilings and stuff
To make it like the world of muscle chicks so that when I squat, it makes it seem normal
That everybody has to have big fat legs so that my legs get fat like that and all stuff like that.
So, um, but, uh, it's probably best to cover it up, keep it covered up.
Stuff covered up for guests, so I'll do a video, a show, a video of, uh, my room after.
Um, and hopefully today I'll do, I'll get my green screen figured out.
I have to get it. I have the program. I think it's Adobe Premiere, right?
So I'll just watch, I guess, the YouTube videos or whatever, the tutorial,
And figure out how to work the green screen, and from now on, voila.
It's green screen, and I'm like one level up in professionalism,
So maybe this is the final day, so.
Anyways, thanks, Mom, for all of the cool stuff for the house.
Peace out.
